signal_sql: -SIGN((close - open) / NULLIF(high - low, 0)) * ABS(((close - open) / NULLIF(high - low, 0) - AVG((close - open) / NULLIF(high - low, 0)) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN 47 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) / (STDDEV_SAMP((close - open) / NULLIF(high - low, 0)) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN 47 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) + 1e-8))
